title: Ottethan warlord

A [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''warlord''' ruled the [[Ottethan Empire]] several decades before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was known for being autocratic and vulgar. After falling to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], [[Neema-Da-Boda]] and her group of friends joined with him, and Neema became his mistress. He befriended Neema's companions to gain their help, learning from them simple defenses against [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="DES" />

He slept with many of Neema's friends, but because her mother, [[Vima-Da-Boda]], objected, Neema only grew closer to him. Finally, they [[Marriage/Legends|married]] in an elaborate wedding, but she came to despise the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], who then abandoned Neema for his dozens of other women. When Neema tried to use the dark side against him, she failed due to the defenses he had learned, and he threw her into his [[Oubliette (stasis casket)|oubliette]].<ref name="DES" />

Neema languished there for months, repenting her ways and finally sending a [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] plea to her mother around [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]]. Vima hurried to her daughter's rescue, to arrive just after the warlord had ordered Neema be loosed in [[Ottethan/Legends|Ottethan's]] forests to be eaten by wild [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]]. In anger, Vima killed the warlord with a single [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] swing, giving herself over to the dark side just like her daughter before her.<ref name="DES" />
